policy_context: 四、獨立第三方審核 > 五、其他事項 > 附件
nearby_paragraphs: Acceptance of the Permit 接受有關許可證
I have read and understood this Permit and shall undertake to work in accordance with all the conditions laid down in it.
本人已細閱及明白有關許可證，並承諾於工作中謹遵有關條款。
Details of the work team 工作人員資料
I certify that the work under this permit is completed. All workers, tools and equipment are cleared
本人證明此許可證內所述之工作經已完成。全部工友、工具及物料已搬離工作地點。
